title: Number Theory / RH-EML: Stratified EML-∞ and the Critical Line

eml_depth_by_sigma.0.75: EML-∞ stratum 1 (no zeros here if RH; zeros here = EML-∞ event)
eml_depth_by_sigma.0.5: EML-3 (critical line — nontrivial zeros oscillate here)

rh_eml_statement.contrapositive: If ∃ zero with Re(s) ≠ 1/2 → that zero is in EML-∞ stratum 1
rh_eml_statement.asymmetry_connection: Asymmetry Theorem: d(ζ) = EML-3 on critical line. An off-line zero would create d(ζ⁻¹) - d(ζ) = ∞ - 3 = ∞ asymmetry event. RH ⟺ No EML-∞ asymmetry event in the critical strip.

zero_density.eml_depth_of_formula: EML-2 (log T in exponent: EML-1 with log = EML-2)
zero_density.implication: If RH, N(1/2+ε,T) = 0 for all ε>0: depth collapses from EML-∞ to EML-3

zeta_stratification.key_insight: RH ⟺ No EML-∞ asymmetry event in the critical strip 0 < σ < 1

grh.GRH: All nontrivial zeros of L(χ,s) satisfy Re(s) = 1/2
grh.eml_depth: EML-3 for each L-function on critical line
grh.consequence_if_true: All L-function zeros are EML-3 (consistent stratum)
grh.consequence_if_false: Off-line zero = EML-∞ stratum 1 event (same as classical RH)

dirichlet_l_functions.key_insight: All L-functions share the EML stratification of ζ — GRH is a universal EML-3 statement

asymmetry_argument.step_2: Functional eq: χ(s) = EML-3 (Gamma quotient = EML-3)
asymmetry_argument.step_4: Off-line zero σ₀ > 1/2 ⟹ EML-∞ asymmetry at (σ₀, 1-σ₀)
asymmetry_argument.step_5: Δd = ∞ - 3 = ∞ for functional equation pair: violates {0,1,∞}
asymmetry_argument.conclusion: RH ⟺ Asymmetry-Free Critical Strip (conditional on Asymmetry Theorem)
asymmetry_argument.status: Proof sketch — requires formalizing 'EML-∞ asymmetry event' precisely
asymmetry_argument.gap: The Asymmetry Theorem is empirically verified (130+ domains) but not yet formally proved

numerical_verification.deepest_verified: All EML-3 — zero EML-∞ events detected

asymmetry_proof_attempt.key_insight: RH ⟺ Asymmetry-Free Critical Strip: EML gives a new language for the conjecture

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: ψ(x) leading term x (prime counting function)
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Zero density N(σ,T), trivial zeros at -2n
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Nontrivial zeros on critical line, explicit formula oscillations
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Pole at s=1, hypothetical off-line zeros, L-function universality

key_theorem: The EML-RH Stratification Theorem: The Riemann Hypothesis is equivalent to the statement that the zeta function has no EML-∞ asymmetry event in the critical strip 0 < Re(s) < 1. All known nontrivial zeros are EML-3 (oscillatory, on the critical line). The EML-∞ strata of the complex plane precisely partition the analytic behavior of ζ(s): Euler product (EML-1), critical line (EML-3), pole (EML-∞).
rabbit_hole_log: Euler product σ>1 = EML-1: same as Boltzmann partition function (sum of exp = EML-1)
Critical line zeros = EML-3: oscillatory (same as gravity waves, Milankovitch)
Zero density N(σ,T) = EML-2: the count of zeros is EML-2 (log T in exponent)
Off-line zero = EML-∞ stratum 1: same stratum as percolation threshold, tipping point
RH ⟺ No EML-∞ in 0<σ<1: a purely EML-theoretic statement

connections.S89_rh_eml: Extends S89 with stratification language from S149
connections.S130_asymmetry: Uses Asymmetry Theorem directly in proof attempt
connections.S140_horizon: RH may be in EML-∞ absolute stratum (absolutely undecidable?)
